name: activity-feed
description: Universal cross-blueprint activity feed renderer. ActivityFeed.render(dv, opts) — time-windowed query (today/week/month) across the canonical type:/created_at: vocab shipped FA-1..FA-7. Renders via customJS.BeaconCards. Materialized on cowork Daily/Weekly/Monthly hubs + NEW Today.md landing surface (FA-9a, v0.62.0).
